items.title: AI日报

items.title: Inkling: Our open-weights model

items.title: Length Penalties Make Chain-of-Thought Less Monitorable
items.summary: Length-penalized reinforcement learning can shorten chain-of-thought reasoning while hiding an influence that drives the model's answer. In our experiments, training with length penalties does not stop misleading hints from steering models, even though the models' chains of thou…
